codeReview.summary: The feature correctly removes the `startsWith('SCREEN-')` condition from navigation 'to' validation, ensuring all targets are checked against defined screens regardless of naming convention. The implementation is minimal, targeted, and addresses the issue described in the feature description.

summary: Feature implementation PASS. The linter now validates all navigation 'to' targets against defined screens without requiring the SCREEN- prefix. The change in ui-md-lint.js:validateReferentialIntegrity() correctly removes the prefix check and adds explanatory comment. Verification showed: (1) undefined SCREEN-* targets are caught, (2) undefined non-prefixed targets are caught, (3) samples/kanban and samples/cli-dashboard still pass. samples/mobile-onboarding has pre-existing validation errors unrelated to this fix.
